name.jp: とっておきの護身武器

description.en: Attacks an enemy and grants a <color=#28d9ed>Barrier</color> to the ally with the lowest Health for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>. The Barrier strength increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Max Health</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 체력 상황이 가장 나쁜 아군에게 <color=#28d9ed>실드</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 부여합니다. 실드량은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>최대 체력</color>이 높을수록 증가합니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、残りHPが最も低い味方単体に<color=#28d9ed>シールド</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。自分の<color=#28d9ed>最大HP</color>が高いほどシールド量がUPする。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并使生命值最低的友军获得<color=#28d9ed>护盾</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。自身<color=#28d9ed>生命值上限</color>越高,则护盾量越高。

description.en: (Triggered Effect)\nThe <color=#28d9ed>Agile Response</color> effect is activated every <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>.\nRemoves <color=#28d9ed>2</color> <color=#28d9ed>debuff(s)</color> and recovers <color=#28d9ed>Health</color> of all allies by <color=#28d9ed>30%</color>.
description.kr: (발동 효과)\n<color=#28d9ed>2턴</color>마다 <color=#28d9ed>신속 대응</color>효과가 발생합니다.\n아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>약화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>2</color>개 해제하고 <color=#28d9ed>체력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 회복시킵니다.
description.jp: (発動効果)\n<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>ごとに<color=#28d9ed>【迅速対応】</color>効果を発動する。\n味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>弱体効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2</color>個解除し、<color=#28d9ed>HP</color>を<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>回復させる。
description.zh: (触发效果)\n每<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>,触发<color=#28d9ed>迅速应对</color>效果。\n解除全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>2</color>个<color=#28d9ed>弱化效果</color>,并使<color=#28d9ed>生命值</color>恢复<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>。

description.en: <color=#28d9ed>Heals</color> selected ally by <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> and increases the target's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 味方単体の<color=#28d9ed>HP</color>を<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>回復させ、<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
description.zh: 使所选友军的<color=#28d9ed>生命值</color>恢复<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>,并使<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

name.jp: イプシロンの複合強化IV

description.en:
(Passive Effect)
Increases <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> by <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> when hit. (Max 10 stacks)
Additionally, increases <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of the caster by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> when hit.

When <color=#28d9ed>Tio</color> uses <color=#28d9ed>Basic First Aid</color>, she increases <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of all allies by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>.
description.kr:
(패시브 효과)
피격 시, <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>이 <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> 증가합니다.(최대 10회 누적)
추가로 피격 시 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가시킵니다.

<color=#28d9ed>티오</color>는 <color=#28d9ed>기본적인 응급 처치</color> 사용 시 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> 증가시킵니다.
description.jp:
(パッシブ効果)
ダメージを受けた場合、<color=#28d9ed>回避</color>が<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>UPする。(最大10回まで累積)
また、ダメージを受けた場合、自分の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>UPさせる。

<color=#28d9ed>【ティオ】</color>が<color=#28d9ed>【基本的な応急処置】</color>使用時、味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>UPさせる。
description.zh:
(被动效果)
受到攻击时,使<color=#28d9ed>回避</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>。(最多可叠加10次)
额外受到攻击时,使自身的<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。

当<color=#28d9ed>蒂欧</color>使用<color=#28d9ed>基本急救</color>时,使全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>。
